title: Chart & Manifest Backfill: Observability
intent: Ensure 17_observability/ has complete chart.yaml (WAS) and manifest.yaml (WIE) for all shards, contracts, and implementations. Monitoring, metrics, tracing, and alerting.
acceptance_checks: chart.yaml exists and is fully populated in 17_observability/
manifest.yaml exists and is fully populated in 17_observability/

All local gates (Policy, SoT, QA) pass
No new files created outside of scope_paths_allow
